refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed into specific sub-functions to address distinct aspects of worksite mapping, enabling focused design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-FR by demonstrating accurate terrain maps, reliable obstacle detection, and correct work-zone representation through simulation and field tests.
sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition
Implement a geospatial data processing algorithm for terrain and obstacle modeling
Develop a GIS-based work-zone representation module
selected_dp.selected_dp: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain mapping and obstacle detection
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically groups terrain and obstacle data acquisition to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports modular GIS-based work-zone representation.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity LIDAR and camera sensors
Risk of sensor data noise affecting mapping accuracy
High safety criticality requires robust obstacle detection
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing GIS-based work-zone representation separately if integration complexity increases.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level processing and integration of worksite mapping functions

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite map data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Facilitates data exchange with Safety Services and remote operators

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the mapping logic and data processing are centralized here.
Vehicle provides raw sensor data but does not process mapping.
Receives processed maps but does not perform mapping.
Consumes safety alerts but not involved in mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if all mapping processing is centralized
Interface latency with Vehicle sensor data streams
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor performance and consider offloading some sensor preprocessing to Vehicle if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping from terrain and obstacle analysis to sensor fusion and data processing.

diffusion_risks: Centralized processing may increase module complexity
Interface latency between Vehicle and NGHE Solution
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the primary owner of mapping functions, minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via integrated system tests using telemetry and tasking interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functions to NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Evaluate sensor data preprocessing distribution to reduce latency
Refine interface specifications for telemetry and tasking

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and safety criticality with clear interfaces and ownership.
next_level_sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensors are available and reliable
Network link supports required data throughput and latency
evidence_needed: Latency and throughput measurements on telemetry interface
